title: podman 0.3.3 depends on containernetworking-cni > 0.6, missing from virt7-container-common repo
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST?**:

/kind bug

**Description**

ran into this working on a new Chef cookbook for crio... it worked this morning, broke this afternoon.

podman is currently uninstallable due to a missing containernetworking-cni package > 0.6 in the virt7-container-common repos. 

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. spin up a cent 7 box

2. set up the virt7-container-common-candidate repo

3. try to install podman

**Describe the results you received:**
```
Error: Package: podman-0.3.3-1.dev.gitbc358eb.el7.x86_64 (virt7-container-common)
           Requires: containernetworking-cni > 0.6
           Installed: containernetworking-cni-0.5.2-7.el7.x86_64 (@virt7-container-common)
               containernetworking-cni = 0.5.2-7.el7

```
**Describe the results you expected:**

podman 0.3.3 successfully installed
